name: Lost or Stolen Device
description: Internal form for employees who have lost (or had stolen) a work laptop, phone, badge, or hardware token. Submissions trigger proactive access revocation by Security.
title: Report a Lost or Stolen Device
intro:
Things happen. Reporting a missing device fast is the single best thing you can do — it lets us revoke access proactively so a lost laptop stays just a lost laptop.

A lost device does not automatically mean you're compromised. We will lock things down as a precaution, not as a punishment. Takes about 3 minutes.

**Important:** after you submit, if the device is a phone or laptop with active sessions, also call the IT hotline so we can begin remote wipe immediately.
submit_message: Thanks. Security will begin revoking sessions and disabling the device within minutes. We'll reach out shortly to confirm next steps and reset what you need to keep working.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: Use a personal email if you've lost the device you'd normally check work mail on.

fields.label: Describe the device
fields.help: Make, model, color, serial or asset tag if you remember any of it.
fields.placeholder: e.g. MacBook Pro 14" 2024, silver, asset tag NW-2241
fields.sample_value: MacBook Pro 14" 2024 - silver - serial M2H3X4PQ91 - asset tag NW-2241

fields.label: Lost or stolen?
fields.help: If you're not sure, pick 'Lost — not sure'.
options: Lost — I think I just misplaced it
Stolen — I'm fairly sure it was taken
Stolen — witnessed or reported to police

fields.label: Where did you last have it?
fields.help: Be as specific as you can — street, venue, time of day.
fields.placeholder: e.g. Cafe on 5th Ave, around 2pm yesterday
fields.sample_value: Coffee shop on 5th Ave near the office, around 2pm yesterday

fields.label: Were any work passwords saved on it?
fields.help: Browser autosave (Chrome, Safari, Edge), saved logins in apps, a sticky note in the laptop bag — anything counts. This decides how aggressively we lock things down.
options: Yes, browser autosave had my work password
Yes, several work logins saved in the browser
Yes, and the device stays signed in to work apps
fields.sample_value: Yes, and the device stays signed in to work apps

fields.label: Was the device locked / passcode-protected?
fields.help: Tells us how easy it is for whoever has it to get in.
options: Yes, locked with passcode / fingerprint / FaceID
Auto-locks but was unlocked when I last had it
fields.sample_value: Yes, locked with passcode / fingerprint / FaceID

fields.label: Did you file a police report?
fields.help: Only matters if it was stolen. Skip otherwise.
options: Yes, I have a report number
N/A — it was lost, not stolen
fields.sample_value: N/A — it was lost, not stolen

fields.label: Anything else we should know?
fields.help: Optional. Anything sensitive that was on the device, anyone you've already told.
fields.sample_value: Had a few customer contracts open in the browser. Already told my manager.

alert_template.title: Lost/stolen {{device_type}} reported by {{reporter_email}}
